title: Braised Beets with German Salad
description: A hearty and flavorful side dish that combines the sweetness of beets with the tanginess of a German-style salad.
instructions: Wrap the beets in foil and roast for 45 minutes.
Let the beets cool down a bit.
Peel the beets and slice them into wedges.
In a large bowl, whisk together the German mustard, apple cider vinegar, and a pinch of salt.
Add the mixed greens, chopped red onion, and sliced beets to the bowl.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
